limitations: Audit covers wrapper signature and forwarding parity against installed SciPy 1.17.1 plus official SciPy documentation/source; numerical convergence, global optimality, and performance remain upstream SciPy behavior.
Witness metadata describes the optimizer result vector shape inferred from bounds; it does not model OptimizeResult scalar diagnostics such as fun, nit, nfev, success, or message.

risk_reasons: Global optimizer results are stochastic or problem-dependent for many objectives; wrapper audit verifies API forwarding rather than optimizer proof obligations.

upstream_symbols.notes: Direct wrapper around scipy.optimize.shgo with constraints default and workers keyword aligned to installed SciPy and official docs.

provenance_evidence: Installed SciPy 1.17.1 signature: shgo(func, bounds, args=(), constraints=None, n=100, iters=1, callback=None, minimizer_kwargs=None, options=None, sampling_method='simplicial', *, workers=1).
Official SciPy docs/source show the same public keyword surface and OptimizeResult return contract.
uncertainty_evidence: No local reimplementation of SHGO internals is present; correctness depends on upstream SciPy.
Global optimality guarantees depend on objective assumptions and selected sampling method.
limitations: Wrapper exposes SciPy OptimizeResult directly; witness only summarizes result.x shape from bounds.

risk_reasons: Differential evolution is stochastic and convergence depends on objective, bounds, strategy, and random generator; wrapper audit verifies API forwarding rather than optimizer proof obligations.

upstream_symbols.notes: Direct wrapper around scipy.optimize.differential_evolution with rng, keyword-only integrality/vectorized, and legacy seed compatibility aligned to installed SciPy.

provenance_evidence: Installed SciPy 1.17.1 signature: differential_evolution(func, bounds, args=(), strategy='best1bin', maxiter=1000, popsize=15, tol=0.01, mutation=(0.5, 1), recombination=0.7, rng=None, callback=None, disp=False, polish=True, init='latinhypercube', atol=0, updating='immediate', workers=1, constraints=(), x0=None, *, integrality=None, vectorized=False, seed=None).
Official SciPy docs/source show the same public keyword surface and OptimizeResult return contract.
uncertainty_evidence: No local reimplementation of differential evolution internals is present; correctness depends on upstream SciPy.
Repeatability depends on rng or seed use, and SciPy forbids specifying both simultaneously.
limitations: Wrapper exposes SciPy OptimizeResult directly; witness only summarizes result.x shape from bounds.
